violations.text: The butcher block table top was observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood ventilation system have an accumulation of dust and soil residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
The ceiling and floor tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The door to the outside, located in the side near the bar, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

The following were observed in poor repair throughout the estblishment: 1) The hot water faucet of the three bay sink at the bar was observed leaking 2) The three bay sink in the kitchen area was lacking stoppers/plugs 3) The butcher block table top in the kitchen area was pitted and seals missing New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) Shelving throughout the kitchen and bar areas have an accumulation of old rodent droppings 2) The vents of the hood ventilation system had dust and other debris New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
The hand sink in the kitchen area was not dispensing hot water at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The floors in the kitchen and bar area have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
